name: sivel-poker-online
description: Sivel Poker with persistent accounts and server-authoritative multiplayer poker.

scripts.start: node apply-server-authority-v55.js && node apply-live-seat-profile-fix-v56.js && node server.js
scripts.test: node --check apply-server-authority-v55.js && node --check apply-live-seat-profile-fix-v56.js && node apply-server-authority-v55.js && node apply-live-seat-profile-fix-v56.js && node --check server.js && node --check account-store.js
